programme.title: Nennunanu
programme.desc: Venu helps an eloped couple, Anu and Arun, marry each other. In Arun's absence, Anu starts living with Venu and Arun's father tells him that his wife is having an affair with another man.

programme.title: Renigunta
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: ORU KUPRASIDHA PAYYAN
programme.desc: Ajayan, an introverted young man, feels helpless when he is accused of murdering an old woman until Hannah, a novice yet astute lawyer, comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Generation Wolf
programme.desc: Generation Wolf talks about a young entrepreneur who is about to lose his business and choose to grow marijuana as an easy way to save it. But soon enough he realizes that crossing the line could have extreme consequences into his life.

programme.title: A Life Lived
programme.desc: After a childhood friend's death, Jake Taylor, an all-star athlete must change his life - and sacrifice his dreams to save the lives of others.

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Photo ID
programme.desc: When Ania and Vlad married they were impoverished

programme.title: Day_Of_Redemption_x264_4000kbs
programme.desc: Small-town retired sheriff Frank Everly finds his life on the skids after his wife Mary is murdered by the ruthless maniac Vincent Pope. When Pope escapes from prison, Everly comes out of retirement to hunt down Mary's killer.

programme.title: Maverick_Manhunt_Brazil_HD_Clean_x264_15mbps
programme.desc: Mysterious mercenary Jack Maverick (Emiliano Ruschel) arrives in the small town of Passo Fundo, Brazil, after accepting a lucrative contract to investigate a series of suicides. As Jack mingles with the locals, his investigation takes him to a bar, where singer Natasha (Carla Elgert), pill popper Olivia (Larissa Vereza) and drug dealer Zonta (Marcio Kieling) might prove to be the key to unraveling the mystery. During his investigation, Jack realizes that the suicides have a dangerous new drug in common, and finds out that an international drug dealing cartel has been pulling the strings all along.

programme.title: In_The_Cage_HD_x264_4mbps
programme.desc: Marvin Fields is caught up with challenges and obstacles. On the verge of losing his family, he has to step up and face his adversaries. Marvin tries different avenues to help eliminate these difficulties, but his efforts are futile. Now, he decides to take desperate measures in saving his family and finances. When hell breaks loose and nothing seems to work, a true character is revealed through Marvin. Later on, Marvin discovers martial arts through his best friend Frank Biggs. This martial art will help Marvin find himself again and give him a sense of purpose. As he continues to search deeper his new found art, his troubles aren't stagnant. Marvin still has to wake up and face the demons of his life. Marvin has got to get his life out of this never diminishing cage and find freedom. In the meantime, Claire Fields (Marvin's wife) is fed up and tired of supporting the family. Marvin's cage seems invisible to Claire, and this continues to trigger his frustration. In the end, true love and friendship will be revealed and seem to help break down the barriers around this mysterious cage.

programme.title: Shift_x264_4mbps
programme.desc: After meeting a mysterious stranger, a man must escape a dystopian world to return to his wife.

programme.title: Killer_Drag_Queens_on_Dope_SD_4000Kbps
programme.desc: Killer Drag Queens on Dope! is the wild story of Ginger & Coco, two dolls with a little secret... They're contract killers who work for a one-eyed lunatic named Uncle A. Half the cutthroats in town are trying to kill them, the other half are trying to sleep with them and Uncle A is just getting started. Ginger is hell on heels. Coco never met a drug she didn't like. Together, they're Killer Drag Queens on Dope!

programme.title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: Ajay loves Ayesha but her father does not approve of Ajay and decides to marry her off to his business partner's son instead. When Ajay persists, her father hires a goon to kill him.

programme.title: Provoked
programme.desc: A Punjabi woman, who was abused by her husband for 10 years. After killing her husband in self-defense, Ahluwalia is imprisoned as those close to her fight to set her free.

programme.title: Mangal Pandey (The Rising)
programme.desc: It is the year 1857. The British are plundering the resources of their Indian subjects, who have reached their breaking point. Soldier Mangal Pandey (Aamir Khan) leads an uprising against India's imperialist occupiers -- events the British call a mutiny and the Indians call a war for independence. Throughout the violent events, Mangal maintains a friendship with Capt. William Gordon (Toby Stephens), who sympathizes with India's subjugated citizens and obeys his conscience.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Car the Garden! This artist made his big debut in the music industry in 2013 under the name Mason the Soul. Then in 2017 he changed his stage name to Car the Garden a literal translation of his name Cha Jeong-won and pleasantly surprised everyone in indie circles with his unique voice and dream-like sounds. The following year he became the final winner of the fan-voting audition program The Fan and further secured his position in the industry. Last month Car the Garden released his much-anticipated new album Absence. Featuring 5 tracks the album is filled with his distinct warm sounds and also showcases his growth as a musician. In this episode Car the Garden performs Tree Sarah and Home Sweet Home as well asMy Whole World and Doesn't Matter from his latest album. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is O3ohn! This artist burst onto the music scene in 2016 with the debut EP O and immediately captured listeners' hearts with his trademark mumbling singing style and dream-like sounds. Then he solidified his unique soundscape with the albums jon1 jon2 and Simple Songs and also through the soundtracks of hit TV series such as Search: WWW and Mr. Sunshine. Recently O3ohn made it to the final round of the music contest show Focus: Folk Us and reached out to a wider audience. His growth is definitely making us anticipate his future as a musician. In this episode O3ohn performs Down Clouds Rolling and more to showcase his musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is a singer with a heartrending voice... Yang Da Il! This artist garnered much attention even before his official debut by taking part in Jung Key's songs Be Forgotten and This Intense Moment in 2011 as a guest vocalist. 4 years later in 2015 Yang Da Il made his official debut with the single Think and engraved his name in the minds of the public with his iconic heartrending voice. In January this year Yang Da Il released his second full-length album our joys and sadnesses to depict love and breakups. His new songs dominated the top spots of music charts and proved once again how beloved he is as a musician. In this episode Yang Da Il performs Loss Darling Sometimes Hurt and Sorry. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and enjoy his depiction of love and separation!

programme.desc: Khatra Khatra Khatra is a comedy-reality show featuring Bharti Singh, Harsh Limbachiyaa, Punit Pathak, and others from Khatron Ke Khiladi. The show focuses on performing funny, embarrassing dares and playing pranks on each other, with losers facing humiliating punishments.

programme.title: Less than Evil
programme.desc: It is a crime drama about the psychological games between a detective with a strong sense of justice but tormented by the crimes he solves, and a genius woman who is insensitive to her own death. ~~ A remake of the UK series "Luther".

programme.title: Please dont Date Him
programme.desc: Home appliance developer Seo Jisung dreams of an easy life like a welldesigned algorithm. The “smart voice recognition AI refrigerator” she is in the process of developing accidentally gets combined with an antiterrorism super sensor chip that went missing from the National Intelligence Service Korea. Her refrigerator that couldn't even determine whether an ingredient was rotten suddenly identifies human lowlifes without even needing her to tell it to. This leads to revealing the truth about Jisung's fiancé. The man she thought of as an elite was actually a criminal. At the perfect timing, Jung Gukhee, a firefighter that seems too good to be true shows up in her life.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean stay in to take delivery of a new lounge chair.

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mr Bean dog-sits for Irma and while in the park comes across a professional dog-walker.

programme.title: The Big Stink
programme.desc: Mr Bean ends up in a farm slurry pit after racing a tractor.

programme.title: Birthday Bother
programme.desc: It's Irma's birthday. Bean buys a bargain-bin load of cards, and writes out two –one nice, one silly.

programme.title: Bed Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean breaks his bed using it as a trampoline. He tries to fix it, but he can't.

programme.title: Spa Day
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean drives her and Miss Wince to their booked spa retreat.

programme.title: Charity Bean
programme.desc: Bean is both cajoled by Irma and spurred by his own jealousy of the fund-raising super-star Declan.

programme.title: Bean Encore
programme.desc: The Great Eduardo, violinist supreme, is in town and Irma wants to go to the concert.

programme.title: Mobile Home
programme.desc: Miss Wince takes Mrs. Wicket off on holiday in her brand-new, swanky caravan and Bean is left behind.

programme.title: Haunted House
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to impress some kids in the park with his football skills.

programme.title: Eau De Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean accidentally spills all of Mrs. Wicket's new, expensive perfume on the floor.

programme.title: Running On Empty
programme.desc: Mr Bean is on his way to the seaside when the mini runs out of petrol.

programme.title: Bean Bug
programme.desc: Scrapper gives Bean fleas, and Bean is forced to call in the pest control person.

programme.title: Coffee Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is out shopping when it starts to rain.

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wakes up on a freezing cold winter's morning to discover that the boiler is broken.

programme.title: Scrapper Cleans Up
programme.desc: Irma wants a romantic break Bean doesn't. It's too expensive.

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Bean wants to avoid lunch with Irma's Mum, at all costs.

programme.title: Save That Tree
programme.desc: Bean is showing Irma his favourite tree when he discovers a tree surgeon getting ready to cut it down.

programme.title: For Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket is persuaded by a jaunty estate agent to put her house up for sale.

programme.title: ISWAR PARAMESWAR
programme.desc: Parameshwar abducts Mahamaya but over time they fall in love. A misunderstanding with her childhood sweetheart is resolved.

programme.title: SWAYANSIDDHA
programme.desc: Swayamsiddha fights the man responsible for her husband's mental condition.

programme.title: SAANJHBATIR RUPKATHARA
programme.desc: Sanjhbati's life takes a turn when she dreams of fairies on her 17th birthday.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.8
programme.desc: While Ok Mae calls for Jo Sang Heon, Lee Rin slips into a room after a scuffle with Do Ha, narrowly missing Sang Heon. Moo Seok feels awkward as Do Ha applies medicine to his arm wound.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.9
programme.desc: Lee Rin is worried about Do Ha's wound. Seeing Lee Rin and Do Ha together, Jo Sang Heon stops Lee Rin. Moo Seok is surprised to see Sang Heon take down five thugs at once.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.10
programme.desc: Lee Rin asks Jo Sang Heon what happened to his father, but Sang Heon coldly turns him away, saying it's none of his business. Meanwhile, Sadam and Hojo are pleased, believing vengeful spirits will heal the dragon god.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.11
programme.desc: Lee Rin informs Jo Sang Heon that Sadam is the one who gathered the vengeful spirits. Sang Heon then explains what happened to King Haejong. Park Soo Jong refuses to ally with the 'lowly shaman' Sadam and has him thrown out.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.12
programme.desc: Lee Rin asks Moo Seok to join him in fighting the smallpox goddess (Mamashin). Meanwhile, Soo Ryun is tortured.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.13
programme.desc: Lee Rin sees Park Soo Jong with Sadam and tells Kisan that Sadam is the true cause of the smallpox, but Kisan refuses to listen. By Sadam's spell, vengeful spirits are sucked into the Imoogi's (serpent's) reverse scale.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.14
programme.desc: As Lee Rin speaks to Kisan, Court Lady Kim tries to tell him something. When Park Soo Jong enters, she glares at him. Park reports to Kisan that the Night Watchmen are gathering around Prince Wolgang (Lee Rin).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awasome
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron throws garbage all around Car City. Rodeo and Booster merge, but Zitron overpowers them. Gary joins them to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Robo needs to find Zitron and stop the dinosaur terrorising Car City before it causes any more chaos.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron blocked the road with mud, and cars are getting stuck! Rodeo and Booster merge in an attempt to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: It' s Rodeo' s birthday! Zitron' s present—a flying shark—goes wild and turns on the guests. Robo comes to the rescue with Carrie' s help.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: It's Ben's Parade in Car City. Zitron escapes from jail, planning to ruin the fun, but Robo foils his plan.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: GATTU
programme.desc: In a Fairy Kingdom,there is a group of righteous Five-Spirit Guards who is protecting the locals from evils. They got magic power, for which is GG Bond always dreaming. But driven by the ambition and the lust for the power, some of Five-Spirit Guards attempted to break the peace of the world and forcibly occupy it.

programme.title: Simba The Lion King
programme.desc: The Lion King is shot by poachers, as part of Shere Khan the Bengal tiger's plot to overthrow the king from his throne. Young Simba, son of the Lion King, suspects something strange and subconsciously senses that the Tiger will one day be his greatest enemy. Simba and his two sisters are adopted into a wolf pack.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The destination is SEMA Show 2019 in Las Vegas, Nevada. As the ghouls visit with fans, they reflect on their accomplishments and failures and look ahead at the exciting upcoming restorations for the new year.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: It's an episode of E-Bodies, including disassembly, documentation and suspicion that one of the newly arrived 'Cudas may have forged numbers.

programme.title: Born To
programme.desc: A true godfather of his sport, Edgar Torronteras, has pioneered FMX and is without a doubt one of the key men responsible for making it what it is today.

programme.title: Born To
programme.desc: Nani Roma has raced cars and bikes in his professional career. However, Nani doesn't race in normal competitions on normal circuits. He races in the Dakar Rally.

programme.title: Power &
programme.desc: Corry Weller from Phoenix Arizona is probably one of the toughest moms from the United States and one of the best in off road racing.

programme.title: Morbidelli Rising
programme.desc: How does a rider feel moments before the race that they have spent their life preparing for? Franco Morbidelli begins his first MOTOGP race weekend in Qatar.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie goes to Hollywood arriving in a million dollar V12 Ferrari. In the ‘City of Angels' Alex is brought into contact with the Brotherhood of Racing, a community of drivers looking to create safe racing conditions for amateurs.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie
programme.desc: Given special access to a 2 million dollar exclusive McClaren Senna, Supercar Blondie digs under the surface to uncover gang feuds in the SLAB (Slow, Low and Bangin') community and meets up with legendary hip hop artists Slim Thug and Paul Wall.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie arrives in Las Vegas in a million dollar Lamborghini SVJ roadster. Taken under the wing of Patrick, founder of the Junkyard Pirates, Alex is brought into the rat rod world - home to American mavericks and outsiders.

programme.title: Inside Moto
programme.desc: We discover the relationship between Brad and Darryn Binder, 2 brothers who race against each other on motorcycle tracks around the world.

programme.title: Inside Moto
programme.desc: Sacrifices are found on the path to success: from Yonny Hernandez's self-exile, to the serious injuries that Doctor Villamor has to treat.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: At the Essen Motor Show over 500 exhibitors present the latest highlights from the car tuning scene. Everything can be found here, from accessories available to everyone to handmade sports cars and top class tuning.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Abt Sportsline stands for car tuning at the highest level. Abt's slogan isn't 'from the race track to the road ' for nothing. Also: the Rohte VW Golf R20. And: the BMW Art Car.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: We visited Brabus, the largest independent automobile tuner where you can find more than 9,000 HP in one place. Also: MTM's Audi RS6 Clubsport.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The Berlin-based company TH Automobiles equips Volkswagen vans with Porsche engines, turning a T5 into one of the most dynamic large saloon cars in the world.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The Conti Tuning Day is themed "Power Sedans" and we take a closer look at the cars on display. Plus: Swiss eccentric Ueli Anliker has built the most expensive Mercedes-AMG SLR in the world, the "Red Gold Dream".

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Gemballa specialises in refining Porsche models, but its portfolio also includes brands such as Ferrari. And: the car tuning company Irmscher turns the Chevrolet Camaro into the 'Irmscher Camaro i42'.

programme.title: Porsche 550 RS Spyder
programme.desc: Historic images of the Porsche 550 RS Spyder.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Land Rover jest podstawą wszystkich pojazdów terenowych. Zbudowany w 1948 roku jako prosty samochód dla brytyjskich rolników, Land Rover szybko stał się hitem eksportowym. Dwa lata później ten wszechstronny pojazd był sprzedawany w ponad 70 krajach. Dziś Landy jest domem na całym świecie. Car History przedstawia historię Land Rovera, który ewoluował w producenta samochodów luksusowych wraz z wprowadzeniem na rynek modelu Range Rover.

programme.title: História do carro
programme.desc: Sempre excepcional no design: os carros da Renault

programme.title: Car History

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.desc: It doesn't matter that there are over a 1000 tornados or millions of thunderstorms take place all over the world every year someone is always going to be there to capture it and when they do, you know that we are going to show it to you!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: You better board up the windows and secure all the doors, because Mother Nature is back and ready to show you just how powerful she can be, with some of the most electrifying, fiercest, and extreme weather videos you have ever seen!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back outside, we've go a brand new episode to change your mind! Brace yourselves, because we're about to head into frenzy once again! From twisty tornados to scary storms, we've got them all.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather. Noun. The state of the atmosphere with respect to heat or cold, wetness or dryness, calm or storm, clearness or cloudiness. As in, "I can't wait to see what kind of weather we have today so I can record it for my favorite TV show, Extreme Weather Countdown."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Get ready, because the forecast says you're in for a blustery day, followed by some heavy rain, and a slight chance of a tornado. It may seem out of the ordinary, but that's just another day in paradise here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Record setting snowfall, tidal waves, rainfall, and flooding all make history in this noteworthy countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction?
programme.desc: Terry and Larry are going to test a famous scene from Underworld with Kate Beckensale. Terry will attempt to shoot a circle around himself in the floor and fall through to save himself from the pack of werewolves.

programme.title: The Demolition Man
programme.desc: The sheer size of these buildings automatically makes this a very difficult job but these towers are also surrounded by hundreds of homes.

programme.title: The Demolition Man
programme.desc: Taking down eight giant towers will take expert precision, planning & explosives. It's imperative none of them fall in the wrong direction or fire any debris.

programme.title: Past, Present, Future
programme.desc: From the first written word to the Internet, we've continued to innovate how we communicate with each other. What happens when technology advances to the point that ideas and thoughts can be shared instantly?

programme.title: Top 10: The Art of Architecture
programme.desc: Bilbao, Amsterdam, Antwerp and Florence belong to a dynamic group of cities that preserve the heritage of humanity through museums.

programme.title: Top 10: The Art of Architecture

programme.title: Top 10: The Art of Architecture
programme.desc: Sports stadiums are widely considered architectural treasures, on par with shrines, cathedrals and other important monuments.

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: Hoping to put a serious dent in the invasive snake population, the guys are determined to track down a massive breeding machine — a legend they call the Mother Burm.

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: With Florida's earliest cold snap in 150 years, the team's Burm captures are on the decline. And, after a massive storm douses their plans to smoke out the snakes on Dunagan Farm, the hunters head to Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The rains have arrived, and the desert has never looked better. Cleo, the boss of this group of wild meerkats has given birth to five new pups, but some of them quickly get lost or snatched away. Only the toughest survive here in the African desert.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: In another cruel twist, Cleo's young pup Ophelia got left behind on a foraging trip and was killed by one of the Kalahari's most dangerous creatures, a Goshawk. The remaining three pups: Zeus, Daisy and Flo struggle to survive.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: These creatures share an amazing trait, the ability use the environment surrounding them to hide in plain sight, to virtually disappear and be utterly camouflaged.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: These creatures all utilize venom and poison to attack, defend and hunt, with devastating results.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: Spotlight on some of the most fascinating creatures from South America! Discover how the powerful jaws of the jaguar can crush bone, and learn why the Galápagos tortoise can grow to nearly 1,000 pounds.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: Showcasing some of the most remarkable animals from North America! Learn how Canada geese can fly more than 600 miles in a single day, and discover how beavers construct massive dams that can stretch over 2,000 feet long.

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: In their increasing efforts to track and trap invasive species, the team is branching out, and for the first time ever they're on the hunt for the elusive Nile monitor lizard.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has 12 weeks until his baby boy is due, and the same amount of time to fulfill a childhood fantasy, to own a 1950s Alfa 158 but since he doesn't have $20 million lying around, he's going to build it.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has found a donor 1950s chassis, so his ambitious Alfa 158 build can now begin digging deep into his passion for the early years of Formula One racing.

programme.title: Downey's Dream Cars: The Thanos Thumper
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr. converts his K10 truck to an all-electric he test-drives two electric cars, including the world's fastest-accelerating production car.

programme.desc: Chuck and Rick get a tip about a hoard of Corvettes, but their dreams may be dashed when they actually see the hoard.

programme.title: All Girls Garage

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Lou wants to do a head and cam swap on an LS1 engine, so Jared brings in a 1981 DeLorean they see how angry they can make this car.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared gets the chance to build his dream project, but learns that time is not on his side.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The girls bring an old '65 Chevy C10 nicknamed Old Red and put on some new parts the big job is installing a new all-electronic 4L60 E Transmission.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The owner of a Malibu Wagon is not shy about driving his car fast, he just needs some help with the steering setup before his next race day the girls get rid of the outdated steering and put in an upgraded steering box and new steering accessories.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Lou and Jared tear down a 1965 Chevrolet Impala and install an Edelbrock top end kit with an upgraded cam.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou replace a one-piece floor panel on a 1955 Chevrolet Nomad wagon.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has 12 weeks until his baby boy is due, and the same amount of time to fulfill a childhood fantasy, to own a 1950s Alfa 158 but since he doesn't have $20 million lying around, he's going to build it.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: “Shark Business” unravels some of the mysteries surrounding sharks with controversial behaviorist Dr. Erich Ritter. You'll witness divers testing the limits of shark-human interaction outside of cages with dangerous sharks such as lemon, bull and even great white sharks!

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been called upon to handle the delicate matter of moving an adult ragged tooth shark from one aquarium to another.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Explore the family dynamic of wildebeests, elephants, and giraffes as we take a trip around Africa.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: “Shark Business” unravels some of the mysteries surrounding sharks with controversial behaviorist Dr. Erich Ritter. You'll witness divers testing the limits of shark-human interaction outside of cages with dangerous sharks such as lemon, bull and even great white sharks!

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been called upon to handle the delicate matter of moving an adult ragged tooth shark from one aquarium to another.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Explore the family dynamic of wildebeests, elephants, and giraffes as we take a trip around Africa.

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Giant Crocodile Found – Could You Outswim Him?
programme.desc: A massive crocodile emerges—can a human really outrun it? Coyote pits human reflexes against one of nature's top aquatic predators.A venomous brown snake hiding in a toilet? Coyote investigates this bizarre real-life scenario and what it means for homeowners in snake territory.

programme.title: Human Hand vs. Box of Pain!
programme.desc: A mystery box, a painful surprise. Coyote risks his hand in a blind challenge to test different insect stings and bites by touch alone.This armored lizard looks like a living dinosaur. Mark handles its powerful bite and explores the evolution of its protective scales.

programme.title: Stung by the Devil's Toilet Paper!
programme.desc: The Devil's Toilet Paper is a painful plant you'll never forget. Coyote experiences its stinging hairs and shows what NOT to do in the wild.Mark takes on the venomous stonefish, famous for the world's most painful sting. This one's not for the faint of heart.

programme.title: Attacked by Bloodsucking Parasites!
programme.desc: Bloodsucking bugs go on the attack! Coyote lets these parasites bite in real time to show how fast they latch and how to stop them.The echidna looks cute, but its spikes say otherwise. Mark handles this spiny Australian mammal and explains its strange biology.

programme.title: Don't Touch! – Up Close with a Rattlesnake!
programme.desc: Coyote gets dangerously close to a rattlesnake. With fangs bared and rattles shaking, he shows what happens when you get too near.An island crawling with dragons? Coyote explores a real-life dragon-infested zone where giant lizards roam freely—and dangerously.

programme.title: Stung by the Gympie Gympie! (World's Most Painful Plant Sting)
programme.desc: Coyote braves the Gympie Gympie, Australia's infamous pain plant. The sting leaves lasting effects and is known to bring grown men to tears.With nothing but his bare hands, Coyote tries catfish noodling—reaching into muddy water for a hidden monster. It's wild, messy, and risky.

programme.title: Giant Frog Kissed! – Prince or Princess?
programme.desc: In a fairytale-worthy twist, Coyote kisses a giant frog in the name of science and fun. Does it turn into royalty? You'll have to see.A sobering episode recounts a fatal snake bite case. Coyote shares what went wrong and what to do in the event of a venomous encounter.

programme.title: Milking the World's Most Venomous Spider!
programme.desc: Coyote attempts to milk the world's most venomous spider in a high-stakes episode filled with fangs, silk, and scientific precision.With panda-like fuzz and a sting that ranks among the worst, this ant is no pushover. Mark explains what makes the panda ant so formidable.

programme.title: Deadly Snake Milking Gone Wrong!
programme.desc: Things go south during a venom extraction. Coyote experiences the dangers firsthand in this episode where snake milking takes a scary turn.

programme.title: Mantis Shrimp Punch Test!
programme.desc: The mantis shrimp packs the fastest punch in nature. Coyote shows how its explosive strike can shatter shells—and maybe more.Maggots vs feet? Coyote steps into 300,000 larvae to demonstrate their bizarre biological purpose and what happens when they swarm.

programme.title: Scariest Pig on the Planet! (Bearded Pig of Borneo)
programme.desc: In Borneo, Mark encounters the bearded pig, a wild and intimidating animal with a face only a mother could love—plus tusks to match.Mark tracks down and is stung by a mammoth wasp—a rare species with a sting that ranks high on the pain scale.

programme.title: Bitten by the Black Flame Centipede! (Instant Regret)
programme.desc: The black flame centipede doesn't disappoint. Mark is bitten and nearly instantly regrets it in this creepy crawler showcase.Mark finds the bizarre ‘murder leaf,' a mysterious plant rumored to harm creatures on contact. Is the myth real? He investigates firsthand.

programme.title: Bitten by the Biggest Ant in the World!
programme.desc: The largest ant in the world? Mark puts its jaws to the test in an unforgettable, up-close bite challenge.Face-to-face with a killer hornet, Mark accepts another sting challenge to educate viewers about hornet defense and behavior.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Peugeot 308 - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: Volvo Cars and Epic Games bring real-time photorealistic visualisation
programme.desc: To offer its customers the best possible user experience, Volvo Cars is bringing photorealistic visualisation technology into its next generation of electric cars through a new collaboration with Epic Games. The companies are teaming up to bring Epic's Unreal Engine game engine into upcoming Volvo cars, providing unparalleled high-quality graphics inside the cabin. Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment and software company probably best known for Fortnite, one of the world's largest games. Epic Games also develops Unreal Engine, widely considered to be the most advanced real-time 3D creation tool used in various industries beyond games, and which will now be used by Volvo Cars for developing digital interfaces inside its cars and rendering real-time graphics in the car.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI TAKES THE STATES 2022 hits the road for another epic adventure
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology - Colour change with the power of thought - The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range_en
programme.sub-title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

By using natural fibres and turning tired items into fabulous new centerpieces, Samantha Pynn transforms a living/dining room from a playroom into a glamourous living space that's sophisticated enough for a busy working mom yet playful enough for her young daughter.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: George is a retired basket ball player, and Mada is an international model. For a man over 7 feet tall, finding the perfect house might be a challenge. Danielle knows high ceilings come in all shapes and sizes, can she find a style they'll like? They also want a pool and a home theatre.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Suhail and Niki have busy schedules. He's a marketing director and she's a doctor so she's often on call for a hospital downtown. Can they find a place that can help relieve stress, but also be close enough to downtown for those urgent calls? They want a secluded home with at least 1 acre and magnificent views.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Melvyn finds himself in seafood galore as he heads to Xiamen, China this week. He meets two different families- one living in a rustic fishing village and the other, the owner of a famous restaurant chain in Xiamen.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Melvyn experiences the contrasts in multicultural Malaysia where he meets up with two very different families: Malaysian royalty who live in an upscale suburb in a sprawling bungalow and a family belonging to the Mah Meri tribe, a once nomadic indigenous people who still live off the land.
